creator: maware@ucsc.edu
text: When trying to use the utilities from the netmap github respository https://github.com/luigirizzo/netmap/ there are a number of errors. looking through the source the netmap module that is compiled in the kernel and drivers is quite old (2016) compared to the repo, and there seem to be many breaking changes. I have tried compiling the tools by linking the versions in the kernel in source but have had no luck. The last working netmap application set I have working is commit 8c69a48711074113d0494da212ce7f8e32c4441b
